steps.title: Use the contrast with deliberate
steps.content: The skeptical colleagues doubted that the kea was intentionally using stones. The word but contrasts their suggestion with Santos's finding that the kea used the stones deliberately, so the blank must mean unintentional.

steps.title: Test the meanings
steps.content: A means interesting, B means clear, and D means able to be seen; none contrasts with deliberate use. The word that directly opposes deliberate behavior is needed because Santos showed the interaction was intentional rather than unplanned. The answer is C.
